json_data.title: Fundamentals of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning
json_data.reason: This topic directly underpins the symbolic aspects of cognitive architectures and rule-based AI, providing essential foundational knowledge for how information is structured and processed.

json_data.title: Embodied Cognition and Robotics
json_data.reason: This area challenges traditional cognitive architecture views by emphasizing the role of physical interaction and the environment in shaping cognition, offering a deeper theoretical and practical perspective for designing intelligent systems.

json_data.title: Neuro-symbolic AI for Robust and Explainable Reasoning
json_data.reason: This cutting-edge research area aims to combine the strengths of neural and symbolic approaches, directly addressing the hybrid architectures, deep learning comparison, and Explainable AI aspects at an advanced level.
